title: pericallis echinata
intro: Pericallis echinata, also known as the Pineapple Flower or Pineapple Plant, is a flowering plant species native to the Canary Islands. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pericallis echinata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Pericallis echinata are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
